Get Started
Claude Implementation

You don't need a prompt.
You need it implemented.

We configure Claude for your specific business, build the workflows your team actually uses, and train everyone until it sticks.

Hire a Consultant → Implementation Details
The problem

Most Claude implementations fail
before they start.

📚
Prompt libraries that gather dust
You get a PDF of prompts. Nobody uses them. Nothing changes.
🪣
Implementation left to you
Consultants advise. You're still the one figuring out how to make it real.
🎯
Generic advice, not your workflow
Templates designed for everyone — which means they fit no one's actual process.
📊
No way to measure ROI
You spend money, something changes, you can't prove what it was worth.
Deliverables

What we actually build.

A complete implementation — not a kickoff and a deck.

01
Discovery & Workflow Mapping
Deep dive into your current workflows, team roles, and highest-friction tasks. We find where Claude creates the most leverage.
02
System Prompt Architecture
Custom system prompts for each use case — built around your voice, your context, your standards.
03
Workflow Buildout
We build complete workflows your team can run repeatedly — not experiments, working processes.
04
Integration Planning
A clear roadmap for connecting Claude to your existing tools — CRM, email, docs, wherever the work actually lives.
05
Team Training
Hands-on training sessions with your whole team — not slides, actual practice on your actual workflows.
06
ROI Benchmarking
We measure time saved on each workflow before and after. You get real numbers, not estimates.
Start with an AI Audit → Full Implementation Details →
